name: United School Bus Inc
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services (Business Records Service)
notes: No FMCSA/SAFER record found by name 'UNITED SCHOOL BUS' (or variants like 'UNITED SCHOOL', 'UNITED BUS') matching Paramus NJ; the SAFER keyword search returned no NJ-based 'United School Bus' carrier. United School Bus Inc. appears on NJ DOE school bus contractor code listings as a NJ school bus contractor (Bergen County), suggesting it operates intrastate without an interstate USDOT registration. Address 100 Brown Cir, Paramus is a residential property (per Zillow records), consistent with a small/home-based intrastate operator. NJ Sunbiz-equivalent (NJ DORES Business Name Search) requires interactive form submission and was not directly scrapable; manual lookup recommended.

name: A1 School Transportation Inc
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services (Business Records Service)
notes: No FMCSA/SAFER carrier record found matching 'A1 SCHOOL TRANSPORTATION', 'A-1 SCHOOL TRANSPORTATION' or 'A1 SCHOOL' in Paterson NJ. Note: a separate Paterson firm 'A-1 ELEGANT TOURS' (aka Eastern Star Transportation), USDOT-registered, was banned by NJ for 10 years for falsifying driver records — likely a different entity, do NOT conflate. Address input '14 Th Paterson St, Paterson NJ 07501' is unusual (possibly '14th Avenue' or '14 Paterson St'); name does not appear in NJSBCA member directory. Likely a small intrastate operator without an interstate USDOT, or possibly inactive. Manual NJ DORES Business Records Search recommended.

name: R C Prime Transportation
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services (Business Records Service); third-party Manta/Buzzfile listings
notes: FMCSA SAFER keyword search returned no carrier 'R C PRIME TRANSPORTATION' or 'RC PRIME TRANSPORTATION' in NJ; the only RC PRIME matches are RC PRIME FLEET LLC (Hickory NC, USDOT 4336833) and RC PRIME TRANSPORT INC (Cicero IL, USDOT 4567680) — neither matches. A related but DIFFERENT NJ entity 'Rc Prime Provisions, Inc.' (USDOT 3061574, 348 Leonard Dr, New Milford NJ; 1 truck, refrigerated food) exists but is freight not school bus and not at the Little Ferry address. RCprime Transportation LLC is referenced as being in Hackensack NJ (phone 201-343-3300; LinkedIn references 'Rosie Rivas, Office Manager at RCprime Transportation, LLC'), and is mentioned on NJ DOE school bus contractor listings. Input address 65 Summit Cir, Little Ferry NJ may be an owner/principal address; primary office likely Hackensack. Likely intrastate operator with no USDOT/MC.

name: St Andrew School Bus Inc
registry_source: NJ Division of Revenue & Enterprise Services (Business Records Service); NJ DOE school bus contractor list
notes: FMCSA SAFER returned no carrier 'ST ANDREW SCHOOL BUS' or 'SAINT ANDREW SCHOOL BUS'; the only NJ-relevant ST ANDREW match was a DE-based 'ST ANDREWS SCHOOL' (USDOT 1096909, Middletown DE) — wrong state. ST ANDREW SCHOOL BUS INC is referenced in NJ DOE 2020-21 school bus contractor codes list as contractor code 0027 in county 02 (Burlington/Camden/Middlesex range, exact county not confirmed). Likely a small intrastate NJ pupil-transport operator with no interstate USDOT. Address 5 Palmer Ct, East Brunswick NJ 08816 is likely a residential/principal address. NJ DORES Business Records Search recommended for official inc_date.

name: Five Star School Trnsprtn Inc
notes: FMCSA SAFER keyword search returned no 'FIVE STAR SCHOOL TRANSPORTATION' carrier in CA. SAFER lists several Five Star Transportation entities but none at Long Beach: FIVE STAR TRANSPORTATION INC (USDOT 2936249, Las Vegas NV; 25 power units, 17 drivers, MC-992210, freight not school bus); FIVE STAR TRANSPORTATION (Compton CA, USDOT 2678367); FIVE STAR TRANSPORTATION (La Mesa CA, USDOT 2879547) — none confirmed at the 3701 Long Beach Blvd address. The only FIVE STAR + Long Beach SAFER match is FIVE STAR TOWING (towing service, not school bus). Address 3701 Long Beach Blvd Suite 100 is a commercial mailbox/office building; subject likely operates intrastate school bus under CA-PUC/CHP TCP authority not FMCSA USDOT, or is inactive/dissolved. CA SOS bizfile search recommended for entity number and inc_date.
